name: Grilled Sausage Tapas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fully cooked Smoked Sausage, cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces
1/2 lb Fully cooked Bratwurst, cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces
1/2 lb Fully cooked Thuringer or cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces
1 Red Delicious Apple, cut into wedges
1 Summer Squash/Zucchini, cut into 1 inch pieces
2 small Onions, parboiled, cut into wedges
1 Small Green and Red Bell Peppers, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the Lemon Pepper Marinade ingredients.
2. Beat with a wire whisk until well blended.
3. Add sausage pieces and coat well, turning with a spatula.
4. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour, turning occasionally.
5. Preheat grill.
6. Alternate sausage with fruit and vegetables on skewers in an attractive fashion.
7. Place kabobs on the grill; brush generously with remaining marinade.
8. Grill 5 to 6 minutes, turning as needed.
9. Brush with marinade.
10. Serve immediately when hot.
